app_identity.name: Channel Broadcaster
app_identity.target_audience: IPTV Operators, TV Broadcasters, Churches, Event Organizers
design_principles: Information clarity and hierarchy are paramount. No wasted space, high density where needed.
High-contrast text and indicators for Live/Offline states.
Professional, moody dark theme by default, with an ultra-clean stark light theme option.
Tactical Minimalism: Replace soft, muddy shadows with crisp 1px borders and subtle inner glows.
Data is the hero: Bitrate, viewers, uptime must jump off the screen.

typography.strategy: Swiss Brutalist meets Soft Utility. Highly legible, structured, numeric-focused.
typography.primary_font: Space Grotesk (BANNED). Use 'Inter' or 'SF Pro' for body, and a strong display font like 'Outfit', 'Chivo', or 'IBM Plex Sans' for Headings to avoid the default look.
rules: Use Mono font (JetBrains Mono) for stream keys, URLs, bitrates, IPs, and technical metrics.
Labels must be tiny, uppercase, and widely spaced (tracking-[0.1em]).
Do not center align block text; keep it left-aligned for rapid reading.
Avoid muddy grey transparency. Use solid off-blacks or off-whites.
Live status indicators MUST pulse using the live_red (#EF4444) color.
The 'Live Red' should ONLY be used for live streaming statuses or destructive actions. Do not use it for primary buttons.
Use primary (Electric Blue) for wallet recharges, primary actions, and copying URLs.

spacing_and_layout.system: Dense & Compact for dashboards, generous for auth/empty states.
rules: Always use safe area insets for mobile layout (react-native-safe-area-context).
Use ScrollView/FlatList properly to ensure content doesn't get clipped.
Cards should have a 1px border (`border border-border`) instead of heavy drop shadows.
Border Radius: `rounded-xl` for large cards, `rounded-lg` for inputs/buttons, `rounded-full` for status dots.

cards.style: Flat, sharp 1px border, no shadow on dark mode, minimal shadow on light mode. Background surface color.
cards.active_state: If a channel card is LIVE, add a subtle colored 1px border (e.g., border-live_red/50) or left accent line.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white font-semibold rounded-lg h-12 flex items-center justify-center active:opacity-80
buttons.secondary: bg-surface_elevated text-text_primary border border-border rounded-lg h-12 flex items-center justify-center active:opacity-80
buttons.destructive: bg-live_red/10 text-live_red border border-live_red/20 rounded-lg h-12 flex items-center justify-center active:opacity-80

inputs.style: h-12 bg-surface border border-border rounded-lg px-4 text-text_primary placeholder:text-text_muted focus:border-primary
inputs.label: text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-text_secondary mb-1.5

badges.live: bg-live_red/10 text-live_red border border-live_red/20 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase
badges.offline: bg-offline_grey/10 text-offline_grey border border-offline_grey/20 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase

list_items.style: flex-row items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border bg-surface active:bg-surface_elevated

auth.layout: Hero image background overlaid with solid gradient transitioning into the login form at the bottom 60% of the screen.
auth.elements: Email Input, OTP mock input (hidden until requested), 'Forgot Password' subtle link, Primary Login/Signup CTA.

dashboard.layout: Grid/List hybrid. Top section: Wallet Balance Widget (prominent, high contrast). Middle section: Quick stats (Active Channels, Expiries). Bottom: Recent Activity List.
dashboard.wallet_widget: Gradient background (Primary to Accent), large bold balance text, 'Recharge' quick action.

wallet.layout: Top half shows large balance, monthly burn rate (₹500/channel/mo). Bottom half is Transaction History FlatList (Credits green, Debits red).

create_channel.layout: Form inside a ScrollView. Fields: Name, Category, Language, Description. Image Picker for Logo.
create_channel.info_banner: Persistent banner: 'Deducts ₹500 from wallet for 30 days validity'.

channel_list.card_anatomy: Left: Logo. Middle: Name, Status Badge (Live/Offline), Remaining Days. Right: Action Menu (...) or Arrow to view.
channel_list.actions: View URLs, Renew, Disable, Delete, Stats.

streaming_info.layout: Data-dense list. Each section (RTMP, HLS, DASH, WebRTC, RTSP) has a label, a Mono-font URL box, and a row of action icons (Copy, Share, QR Code).
streaming_info.security: Stream keys should be masked by default with an 'eye' icon to reveal.

stream_monitoring.layout: Top: HLS Video Player component (16:9 aspect ratio). Middle: Live Metrics Grid (Bitrate, Resolution, FPS, Codecs, Viewers). Bottom: Uptime chart or stats.
stream_monitoring.metrics_styling: Bento grid style. Each metric is a small square card. Number is large (Mono font), label is tiny.

admin_portal.layout: Tabbed view or list of admin actions: Manage Users, All Channels, Revenue, System Wallet Credits.

auth_background.usage: Use as a blurred or dark-overlay background for the Auth/Login screen.

default_channel_logo_1.usage: Use as a default fallback image for Channel Logos if none is uploaded.

user_avatar.usage: Use as the mock avatar for the logged-in user or admin user lists.

general_ui_ux_design_guidelines: Testing Attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `testID` (for React Native) or `data-testid` (if using web/expo-web) attribute. Format: kebab-case (e.g., `testID="login-submit-button"`).
Theme Support: Implement both Dark and Light themes. Default to Dark Theme since it is a broadcaster app. Provide a toggle in settings.
Opacity States: Instead of hover states (which don't exist on mobile), always use `activeOpacity={0.7}` on Touchables for immediate tactile feedback.

Transparent Backgrounds: DO NOT use complete transparent backgrounds in headers, sticky footers, or modals over content. Use solid colors or heavy blurs (if platform supports) to ensure text legibility.
Typography Alignment: Left-align block text and forms. Center-align only for empty states or simple dialogs.
Avoid AI Slop: Do NOT use standard generic emojis for icons. Use a professional icon set (Lucide or Phosphor). Do NOT use generic gradients on text or backgrounds unless specified.
instructions_to_main_agent: This is an Expo React Native application. Do NOT use HTML/Web elements like <div>, <span>, or Shadcn UI React Web components.
Use standard React Native components: View, Text, TextInput, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, FlatList, Modal.
If using NativeWind, apply Tailwind utility classes via the `className` prop on Native components.
For the built-in stream preview, use `expo-av` or a suitable React Native video player capable of HLS playback.
Make sure all lists (Channels, Activity, Transactions) use `FlatList` for performance, not a `.map()` inside a `ScrollView` if data could be large.
Ensure safe areas are respected using `react-native-safe-area-context`.
